intended_use: The Ceribell Status Epilepticus Monitor software is indicated for the diagnosis of Electrographic Status Epilepticus in patients greater than or equal to 18 years of age who are at risk for seizure. T
intended_use_full: The Ceribell Status Epilepticus Monitor software is indicated for the diagnosis of Electrographic Status Epilepticus in patients greater than or equal to 18 years of age who are at risk for seizure. The Ceribell Status Epilecticus Monitor software analyzes EEG waveforms and identifies patterns that may be consistent with electrographic status epilepticus as defined in the American Clinical Neurophysiology Society's Guideline 14. The diagnostic output of the Ceribell Status Epilepticus Monitor is intended to be used as an aid for determining patient treatment in acute-care environments.
ground_truth: Reference-standard established by majority opinion of a team of qualified neurologists who independently reviewed and categorized each EEG as ESE-positive or ESE-negative
other_metrics: True positives: 10/10 (100% sensitivity); True negatives: 319/340 (94% specificity); False positives: 21/340 (6%); False negatives: 0/10
